title: hieracium pulchellum subsp. morthieri
intro: Hieracium pulchellum subsp. morthieri, also known as the small hawkweed or morthier's hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Hieracium pulchellum subsp. morthieri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Hieracium pulchellum subsp. morthieri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
